summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Panshi Restaurant website. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Admin authentication and dashboard fully functional. Public features (menu, contact form, blog) working with minor frontend issue in blog post detail page.

ui_bugs.issue: React Helmet error - title tag not properly formatted causing runtime error
ui_bugs.error: Helmet expects a string as a child of <title>. Did you forget to wrap your children in braces?

passed_tests: Admin dashboard loads with correct stats (18 Products, 3 Blogs, 6 Reviews, 2 Messages)
Admin navigation between Products, Blogs, Reviews, Messages sections
Products Manager - view all products with images, categories, prices, stock toggles
Blog Manager - view all blog posts with thumbnails, authors, status
Reviews Manager - view reviews with ratings, approval status, action buttons
Menu page loads with category filters working (tested Biryani filter)
Contact form submission works with success message
Blog listing page displays all 3 blog posts correctly
All backend API endpoints (18/18 tests passed)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix React Helmet error in blog post detail page - ensure title tag receives a string value instead of undefined/object
